title: The 31 System Strategy Guide: Capitalizing on Two Wins in a Row
author: Taizo
excerpt: The 31 System is a targeted negative progression strategy designed to find a single two-win streak within 9 rounds. We analyze its efficiency for 2026 Canadian players.
metaTitle: 31 System Strategy Guide 2026 | Safe Progression Betting
metaDescription: Learn how the 31 system works. Discover the mathematics of using a specific sequence (1-1-1-2-2-4-4-8-8) to win on even-money games like Baccarat.
content:
9-STEP PROGRESSION 2026

The **31 System** is a disciplined approach to recovering losses through a specific sequence of 9 bets totaling $31. The logic is that you only need a single two-win streak within those 9 rounds to return a profit. Its structured nature makes it one of the most reliable and low-stress ways to manage your bankroll on Baccarat and Roulette tables in 2026.

The Logic: Sequence Mastery

The sequence is **1, 1, 1, 2, 2, 4, 4, 8, 8**. You move to the next number after each loss. If you win two in a row at any stage, the sequence ends and you pocket the profit. This 2026 guide emphasizes starting small and treating each $31 block as one independent 'bullet' in your bankroll.
